title: Lucid Motors secures $1.5 billion funding from Saudi Arabia's PIF
text: Lucid Motors topped Wall Street's Q2 revenue estimates after announcing another $1.5 billion investment from Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund. With this $1.5 billion commitment, Lucid said it has enough liquidity runway until at least Q4 2025. In March 2024, Lucid announced an agreement with Ayar Third Investment Company, an affiliate of the Public Investment Fund (PIF), to purchase $1.0 billion of newly created series of convertible preferred stock via private placement. In October 2024, Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund purchased about 396 million LCID shares at $2.59 per share on October 30 and 31, with a total investment value of $1.03 billion. PIF's continued investment demonstrates confidence in Lucid's long-term vision despite ongoing operational challenges.
